channel.title: Frontion News - Geopolitical Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources worldwide

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump Says Iran 'Really Wants' a Deal as Both Sides Exchange Fresh Strikes
item.description: President Trump expressed optimism about reaching an agreement with Iran, saying Tehran 'really wants to make a deal' that would be good for the US and its allies. Meanwhile, both sides continued to exchange strikes, with Iran targeting a US base in Kuwait and the US hitting Iranian military sites.

item.title: 🇱🇧🇮🇱 US Proposes New Israel-Lebanon De-escalation Plan Amid Fighting
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio spoke with leaders from both countries and proposed a plan for 'gradual de-escalation' as Israeli troops continue to push into southern Lebanon. The fighting has become the broadest spillover of the Iran war.

item.title: 🇰🇼⚔️ Iran Strikes US Base in Kuwait After American Attacks on Military Sites
item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guard targeted a US base in Kuwait in retaliation for US strikes on Iranian radar and drone control sites. Air defenses in Kuwait intercepted missiles and drones as sirens sounded across the country.

item.title: 🇰🇷💥 Five Killed in Explosion at Hanwha Aerospace Defense Plant in South Korea
item.description: An explosion at a Hanwha Aerospace factory in Daejeon killed five people and injured two others. The plant is a major facility for South Korea's defense industry, producing rockets and other military hardware.

item.title: 🇨🇴🏛️ Pro-Trump Outsider Wins First Round of Colombian Presidential Election
item.description: Far-right candidate Abelardo de la Espriella won the first round of Colombia's presidential election with 43.7% of the vote. He will face leftist Ivan Cepeda in a runoff that could reshape Colombia's relations with the United States.

item.title: 🇰🇷 Explosion at Hanwha Aerospace plant kills 5 in South Korea
item.description: An explosion at Hanwha Aerospace's Daejeon facility killed five and injured two. The plant produces large propulsion engines and handles rocket propellants for South Korea's defense sector.

item.title: 🇳🇵🇮🇳 Nepal PM proposes dialogue to resolve India border dispute
item.description: Nepal's new PM Balendra Shah told Parliament both countries have encroached on each other's territories, calling for a joint study and friendly resolution of the Lipulekh, Limpiyadhura and Kalapani disputes.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇺🇸 US strikes Iran sites, Tehran targets US base in escalating exchanges
item.description: US Central Command said it struck Iranian air defenses and drone control sites after Iran shot down a US MQ-1 drone. Iran's IRGC said it targeted a US airbase used in attacks on southern Iran. Kuwait reported intercepting missiles and drones.

item.title: ⚔️ US Strikes Iranian Military Sites, Tehran Retaliates Against American Base
item.description: The US military struck Iranian radar and drone control sites after Tehran shot down an American MQ-1 Predator drone. Iran's Revolutionary Guards said they targeted a US base in response, marking the latest escalation in the three-month-old conflict.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel Captures Strategic Beaufort Castle in Deeper Lebanon Incursion
item.description: Israeli troops captured the historic Beaufort Castle in southern Lebanon as Netanyahu ordered a broader offensive against Hezbollah. The fighting represents the largest spillover from the Iran-US conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukrainian Drones Strike Russian Oil Pipeline, Refinery and Fuel Depot
item.description: Ukrainian drones targeted energy infrastructure across multiple Russian regions overnight, hitting an oil pipeline pumping station, a refinery and a fuel depot in an escalating campaign against Russian energy assets.

item.title: 🕊️ Zelenskiy Seeks Peace Progress Before Winter as Ukraine Gains Strategic Ground
item.description: Ukraine's president said he wants to advance peace talks with Russia before winter, citing Kyiv's improved strategic position. The interview comes as Ukrainian forces continue drone strikes deep inside Russian territory.

item.title: 🇰🇼 Kuwait Intercepts Drone and Missile Attacks as Iran Conflict Spreads
item.description: Kuwait's military intercepted missiles and drones over the country as regional spillover from the Iran-US conflict intensifies. The Gulf state reported air defense activations amid broader escalation across the Middle East.

item.title: 🇮🇳 India Faces Critical RBI Policy Decision Amid Iran War Pressure
item.description: The Reserve Bank of India meets this week as the Iran conflict drives up energy prices and complicates growth and inflation forecasts for Asia's third-largest economy.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Nvidia CEO Takes Center Stage at Computex Taipei
item.description: Jensen Huang opens the Computex trade show in Taiwan with a major speech on AI products and the island's central role in the semiconductor industry.

item.title: 💰 Gold Slips as Markets Await Trump Decision on Iran Ceasefire
item.description: Gold prices fell as a stronger dollar and rising oil prices pressured the metal, with investors waiting for Trump's decision on extending the Iran ceasefire.

item.title: 🛢️ China Crude Oil Imports Slump to Near 10-Year Low
item.description: China's seaborne crude imports fell to the lowest in almost a decade as the Iran war reshuffles operations for the world's biggest oil importer.

item.title: 🇫🇷🇮🇷 Macron demands quick US-Iran deal, unconditional reopening of Strait of Hormuz
item.description: French President Emmanuel Macron launched a major diplomatic push in the Middle East, demanding that Washington and Tehran quickly conclude an agreement and unconditionally reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Trump Seeks Edits to US-Iran Deal, Demands Tougher Terms
item.description: President Trump requested changes to the proposed Iran ceasefire deal related to the Strait of Hormuz and uranium removal. Iran says talks continue but no deal is final until Iranian rights are secured.

item.title: 🌍 Analysis: Trump Iran War Could Eclipse Vietnam as Geopolitical Turning Point
item.description: The Guardian examines how Trump's Iran conflict may mark a greater strategic setback for US global influence than Vietnam, with Iran learning from Ukraine that drones are the great equalizer against superior military power.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇪🇺 US Castigates European NATO Allies Over Defense Spending at Singapore Summit
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth sharply criticized European allies for insufficient defense contributions at the Shangri-La Dialogue, telling them to spend more rather than "moralize" while reassuring Asian partners of US commitment.

item.title: 🇪🇹 Ethiopian Election Expected to Hand Abiy Ahmed Landslide Win
item.description: Ethiopia holds parliamentary and regional elections with analysts predicting a landslide victory for PM Abiy Ahmed's party despite significant unrest across much of the country.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 US Moves to Block Nvidia AI Chip Shipments to Chinese Firms Abroad
item.description: The Commerce Department issued new guidance to close a loophole allowing Chinese AI firms' overseas subsidiaries to access restricted US AI chips, tightening export controls.

item.title: 🇲🇲 Myanmar Village Explosion Kills at Least 55 People
item.description: A blast in Kaungtup village in northern Myanmar killed at least 55 and injured dozens more. A rebel army said it was caused by accidental explosion of mining materials.

item.title: 🇨🇿🇪🇺 Czech Republic Likely to Miss NATO Defence Spending Target
item.description: Prime Minister Andrej Babis told the Financial Times that the Czech Republic will probably fail to meet NATO's 2% GDP military spending target this year.
